  CL9NK Entry: perfect_cuboid
  An Euler brick where additionally the space diagonal sqrt(aВІ+bВІ+cВІ) is integer. Equivalent to finding a perfect
  rectangular cuboid with all 7 distances (3 edges, 3 face diagonals, 1 space diagonal) being integers. Unknown
  existence вҖ” oldest open problem in Diophantine geometry, equivalent to a simultaneous system of 4 Pythagorean
  equations.

  CL9NK Entry: perfect_cuboid
  An Euler brick where additionally the space diagonal sqrt(aВІ+bВІ+cВІ) is integer. Equivalent to finding a perfect
  rectangular cuboid with all 7 distances (3 edges, 3 face diagonals, 1 space diagonal) being integers. Unknown
  existence вҖ” oldest open problem in Diophantine geometry, equivalent to a simultaneous system of 4 Pythagorean
  equations.
  Reference: CLINK L9 (Gaussian Moat Resolution) вҖ” вҹЁрҗ‘ӣрҗ‘Ҙрҗ‘‘рҗ‘¬рҗ‘җрҗ‘Әрҗ‘”рҗ‘қвҠҷрҗ‘«рҗ‘ірҗ‘ӯвҹ© (from design)

  descent, using Phi_ctyogh self-modeling framework with omega_Z winding number conservation. All 22 lemmas proved; 3
  axioms at the critical descent edge.

  CL9NK Entry: perfect_cuboid
  An Euler brick where additionally the space diagonal sqrt(aВІ+bВІ+cВІ) is integer. Equivalent to finding a perfect
  rectangular cuboid with all 7 distances (3 edges, 3 face diagonals, 1 space diagonal) being integers. Unknown
  existence вҖ” oldest open problem in Diophantine geometry, equivalent to a simultaneous system of 4 Pythagorean
  equations.
  Reference: CLINK L9 (Gaussian Moat Resolution) вҖ” вҹЁрҗ‘ӣрҗ‘Ҙрҗ‘‘рҗ‘¬рҗ‘җрҗ‘Әрҗ‘”рҗ‘қвҠҷрҗ‘«рҗ‘ірҗ‘ӯвҹ© (from design)

  CL9NK Entry: perfect_cuboid
  An Euler brick where additionally the space diagonal sqrt(aВІ+bВІ+cВІ) is integer. Equivalent to finding a perfect
  rectangular cuboid with all 7 distances (3 edges, 3 face diagonals, 1 space diagonal) being integers. Unknown
  existence вҖ” oldest open problem in Diophantine geometry, equivalent to a simultaneous system of 4 Pythagorean
  equations.

  CL9NK Entry: perfect_cuboid
  An Euler brick where additionally the space diagonal sqrt(aВІ+bВІ+cВІ) is integer. Equivalent to finding a perfect
  rectangular cuboid with all 7 distances (3 edges, 3 face diagonals, 1 space diagonal) being integers. Unknown
  existence вҖ” oldest open problem in Diophantine geometry, equivalent to a simultaneous system of 4 Pythagorean
  equations.
  Reference: CLINK L9 (Gaussian Moat Resolution) вҖ” вҹЁрҗ‘ӣрҗ‘Ҙрҗ‘‘рҗ‘¬рҗ‘җрҗ‘Әрҗ‘”рҗ‘қвҠҷрҗ‘«рҗ‘ірҗ‘ӯвҹ© (from design)
